_comment: Which payment providers appear in the API/UI. Each key must have a matching entry in app.subscriptions.billing_provider._REGISTRY (Python). Remove a provider from this list to hide it; add a row here and register the class to support a new provider.

providers.label: Card (Stripe)
providers.description: Credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay

providers.label: PayPal
providers.description: PayPal balance or linked card — subscription checkout coming soon
